creator: hetzels@westbend.net
text:
I don't believe your supposed to upgrade numbered ports past there Major
numbers.

You should upgrade print_ghostscript6 to 6.51 instead of print_ghostscript55
(PR 29579).  This would also satisfy Poul-Henning Kamp's request (PR 29576).

If there isn't a print_ghostscript7, then you need to ask for a repo-copy of
print_ghostscript6 to print_ghostscript7.

Scot
